task_description: find duplicate files based on file size and name
code:
while read -r size; do
    grep "^$size " file_sizes.txt | awk '{print $2}' | xargs -I {} basename {} > names_$(echo $size).txt
done < duplicate_sizes.txt
echo "Names of files with duplicate sizes saved to names_*.txt"

trace.stdout: Names of files with duplicate sizes saved to names_*.txt

messages.content:
```bash
echo "Starting duplicate file search based on size and name."
find . -type f -printf "%s %p\n" | sort -n > file_sizes.txt
echo "File sizes and paths saved to file_sizes.txt"
```

echo "Duplicate sizes saved to duplicate_sizes.txt"
